subject: Growth Strategy Sync
description: Maya, I need your sign-off on the Q4 ad spend allocation before we push it live on Tuesday. This is a quick walkthrough of the budget shifts.

subject: Portfolio Update / Coffee
description: Hey Maya, I'm in town on Tuesday and would love to catch up on your recent traction. Let me know if this slot works or if we should find another time.

subject: UI/UX Review: Mobile V2
description: Final review of the onboarding flows. If we don't finalize these by Wednesday, the dev team will be blocked for the sprint.
